description_long: This cabinetry unit is a large, L-shaped built-in structure designed for corner installation, likely in a public or semi-public urban environment such as a library, office, or reception area. The left section features a tall shelving unit with multiple open shelves for storage or display, while the right section extends into a lower counter with integrated drawers and open cubbies beneath. The cabinetry is predominantly white, with clean, modern lines and a smooth, matte finish. The back and side panels are solid, providing structural support and visual separation from the surrounding space. There are no visible handles or hardware, suggesting a minimalist design with possible push-to-open mechanisms. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for high-traffic or communal areas.
description: A large, L-shaped white built-in cabinetry unit with open shelving, drawers, and a smooth, modern finish. Designed for corner installation, it features both tall and low storage sections.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the tall open shelving unit, lower counter, and integrated drawers and cubbies.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the tall shelving and the solid side panel enclosing the unit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panels and the full L-shaped footprint of the cabinetry.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite end, emphasizing the solid panel and the end of the lower counter section.
attribute_cabinet_type: corner base and tall shelving unit
attribute_door_configuration: open shelf and drawers, no doors
